text:
NAME: MC_PLAN_SAREA_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: 
1 = Statewide — the managed care entity provides services to beneficiaries throughout the entire 
state. 
2 = County — the managed care entity provides services to beneficiaries in specified counties. 
3 = City — the managed care entity provides services to beneficiaries in specified cities. 
4 = Region — the managed care entity provides services to beneficiaries in
